# @ic-reactor/core — AI Quick Guide

Framework-agnostic runtime for IC apps. Use this when you are not writing
React hooks directly.

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @ic-reactor/core @icp-sdk/core @tanstack/query-core
```

## Core Building Blocks

- `ClientManager` for shared agent + QueryClient state
- `Reactor` for raw Candid values
- `DisplayReactor` for UI-friendly transformed values

## Preferred Usage

- Reuse one `ClientManager` across multiple canisters
- Use `fetchQuery` / `getQueryData` / `invalidateQueries` for cache-aware calls
- Use `callMethod` for imperative update/query calls

## DisplayReactor Guidance

- Choose `DisplayReactor` when users type/read principals and numbers in forms
- Validation can run on display values before calls

## Error Types

- `CanisterError`: canister `Result.Err`
- `CallError`: transport/agent failures
- `ValidationError`: display-validator failures

## Generated Files

If generated declarations are wrong, change source `.did` or codegen templates.
Do not hand-edit generated output.

## Full References

- Full AI guide: https://ic-reactor.b3pay.net/llms-full.txt
- Core docs: https://ic-reactor.b3pay.net/v4/packages/core
